calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-23-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: The matter comes on calendar for Small Claims Appeals trial de novo in Dept. 514, having been continued from October 1, 2008.

Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant Down, Etc. represented by employees RAYMOND PESTALOZZI and KARRIE YU present.
Respondent, Plaintiff ELIZABETH RAMOS also present.

01:57pm The parties are sworn. Appellant Raymond Pestalozzi presents the Court and Respondent Ramos with a computerized report of Respondent Ramos' work log. Mr. Pestalozzi testifies on behalf of Down, Etc.

Respondent Elizabeth Ramos testifies on behalf of herself.

JUDGMENT IS ORDERED in favor of Respondent/plaintiff ELIZABETH RAMOS and against Appellant/defendant DOWN ETC., in the amount of $1,500.00 principal and $73.00 costs for a total Judgment in the amount of $1,573.00.

Exhibits are ordered returned.

Judge Thomas J. Mellon, Jr., Clerk: V. Mack, Not Reported (Dept. 514)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Continued To Oct-23-08 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant Down, Etc. represented by employees RAYMOND PESTALOZZI and KARRIE YU present.
Respondent, Plaintiff ELIZABETH RAMOS also present.

10:00am The cause comes on regularly for trial de novo in Dept. 514 as assigned by the Department of the Presiding Judge. The parties are sworn.

10:05am The Court orders the parties to return at 1:00pm in Dept. 514, this date.

1:10pm All parties present. Respondent Elizabeth Ramos testifies on behalf of herself.

Raymond Pestalozzi testifies on behalf of Down, Etc.

2:20pm The trial is CONTINUED TO OCT. 23, 2008 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Set For Trial On Oct-01-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 514
